description: Optional Cloudflare edge layer for Task 008 (Z-Bridge soft launch) and emergency read-only access. Hub authority remains PC/NAS + this repo. Do not commit Account ID, API tokens, or Wrangler secrets — use dashboard + local env only.
purpose: Contingency: serve static/read-only Z-Bridge or dashboard mirrors when local SSWS is unreachable.
Soft launch: preview hosting per MONOREPO_GUIDE Task 008 without binding hub governance to Cloudflare production semantics.
operator_email_note: Dashboard login aligns with data/z_ecosystem_github_identity.json (primary email).

edge.account_id_policy: Set in Wrangler / dashboard only; never commit plaintext Account ID to git unless repo is private and policy allows.

dashboard_ui_refs: Workers & Pages (empty project list is OK until first deploy)
Ask AI — navigation hints only; verify against hub docs
Third-party agent prompts (e.g. read-only API access) — minimum scope; rotate on doubt
